name: OpenClaw Host Git Workflow
description: Host-backed git workflow scaffold with bundled skill and bounded runtime slices for planning, repo resolution, node selection, preflight, push, and PR creation.

repoPath.description: Optional explicit repo path override for workflow planning.

baseBranch.description: Preferred base branch for later host-backed finish flow.

nodeSelector.description: Host node selector input with config precedence now normalized by the package, but not yet bound to runtime node.invoke.
